description_long: This is an adult male figure with a full beard and short, styled hair, standing with arms extended horizontally. He is wearing a long-sleeved, loose-fitting sweatshirt with a high collar and a pair of knee-length shorts. The figure also sports large, wraparound sunglasses that cover much of the upper face. On his feet are low-top sneakers with visible laces and thick soles. The overall build is athletic, and the clothing style is casual and suitable for urban environments. The figure's posture is upright and symmetrical, with no visible carried objects or accessories beyond the sunglasses.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a beard, sunglasses, sweatshirt, shorts, and sneakers, standing upright with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beard, sunglasses, full face, and the front of the sweatshirt and shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, beard, sunglasses, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, sweatshirt, and shorts, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, beard, sunglasses, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve sweatshirt and knee-length shorts with low-top athletic footwear and large sunglasses
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short, styled hair with full beard
